query:
-- Ver as conversas do número de teste
SELECT c.id, c.customerId, c.isActive, c.createdAt 
FROM conversations c 
JOIN customers cu ON c.customerId = cu.id 
WHERE cu.whatsappId LIKE '%5517992253886%' 
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT c.id, c.customerId, c.isActive, c.createdAt 
FROM conversations c

ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
